ddt:Target.Name: INV_KAI_E011_510_V1.0
ddt:Target.Description:
Auteur: Arjun Muthu K R
Applications: XJB Soft: E011_510XX,
Documents de référence: DIDs (RENAULT) DG_VECTOR_DCM_INVH_PEB_KAIZEN_v3.0 (2) DTCs DG_VECTOR_DEM_INVH_PEB_KAIZEN_v1.0
Base de depart: INVME_6306_420_V1.0 ------------------------------------
16/05/2022(AMU) INV_KAI_E011_510_V1.0 -Added Vdiag $09 Added Project ; XJB -407 DID update DID Adeed as per the Spec - DG_VECTOR_DCM_INVH_PEB_KAIZEN_v3.0 (2)
DTC - 108 DTC is added DTC Adeed as per the Spec - DG_VECTOR_DEM_INVH_PEB_KAIZEN_v1.0 Routine Identifier List and Output Permanent Control List Updated as per the Base SW INVME_6306_420_V1.0
DTC $1A51 Having Description "HSG Boost PWM(between rectifier and inverter)" has been Deleted.

Data.Name: DTCFormatIdentifier
Data.Comment: DTC format - Renault/Nissan use value 0 (3 bytes DTC)

Item.Text: FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
Device and failure type ODB codding
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked
Incoherent saftey information send on CAN
HSG Inverter non traction safety watch
HSG Incoherent saftey information send on CAN
CAN communication with HEVC frame 2 and 3
HSG Electromotive force measurement in EOL
HSG CAN communication with HEVC frame 2 and 3
HSG CAN communication with HEVC frame 11
HSG CAN communication with HEVC frame 7
HSG CAN communication with battery frame 102
HSG CAN communication with HEVC frame 112

HSG CAN communication with HEVC frame 117

Data.Name: RoutineControlType
Data.Comment: Routine control type - VALUES OTHER THAN 1, 2 & 3 ARE RESERVED AND SHOULD NOT BE USED.

Data.Name: RoutineIdentifier
Data.Description:
Definition of RoutineControl

Data: RoutineIdentifierList

  Contains the list of all routine identifier that may be used with InputOutputControl service.
 
  Example:
  
    0x4501 - ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave

If some of these routine identifer have parameters, you should defined a data with the same name as the routine identifer followed by a dot and a text

  Example:
 
  Data: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Min
  Data: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Max
  Data: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Freq

Then, you should add theses data in the "Send tab" of the RoutineControl request, after the RoutineIdentifierList data.

Item.Text: Command for SED activation, thermic engine stopped
Test routine for UDS implementation validation

Data.Name: IOCTL.DataIdentifier
Data.Comment: Data Identifier received in reply to InputOutputControl request

Data.Name: OutputPermanentControlList
Data.Comment: List of Data Identifiers for Input Output Control
Data.Description:
Definition of IOControl

Data: IOCTL.DataIdentifierList

  Contains the list of all IO devices that may be
  controlled by InputOutputControl service.
 
  Example:
 
    0 - DID_Pump
    1 - DID_Wiper

If some of these IO devices have parameters, you should defined a data with the same name as the IO devices followed by a dot and a text

  Example:
 
  Data: DID_Wiper.Mode
     Type: List
       0 - Slow speed
       1 - High speed

Then, you should add theses data in the "Send tab" of the InputOutpuControl request, after the IOCTL.OptionRecord.Parameter data.

Label.Text: Si Etat protégé = 1 alors démarrage impossible
Immobilizer - engine not running due to BCM
Immobilizer - engine not running due to BCM in secure mode
Immobilizer - engine not running due to no BCM authorisation
Immobilizer - engine not running due to a CAN network problem with the BCM
Danc ce cas le calculateur est déprotégé et n'interdit pas le démarrage moteur
Immobilizer - engine not running due to BCM
Immobilizer - engine not running due to BCM in secure mode
Immobilizer - engine not running due to no BCM authorisation
Immobilizer - engine not running due to a CAN network problem with the BCM
L'ECM est protégé car il ne reçoit pas les trames de la BCM: l'ECM n'autorise pas le démarrage moteur.
Immobilizer - engine not running due to BCM
Immobilizer - engine not running due to BCM in secure mode
Immobilizer - engine not running due to no BCM authorisation
Immobilizer - engine not running due to a CAN network problem with the BCM
L'ECM est protégé car la BCM ne répond pas correctement: l'ECM n'autorise pas le démarrage moteur.
-> La BCM n'a pas authentifié la clé ou le badge
-> L'ECM n'est pas monté sur le véhicule sur lequel il a appris le code
Immobilizer - engine not running due to BCM
Immobilizer - engine not running due to BCM in secure mode
Immobilizer - engine not running due to no BCM authorisation
Immobilizer - engine not running due to a CAN network problem with the BCM
L'ECM est vierge et protégé car la BCM n'envoie pas la clé secrète: l'ECM n'autorise pas le démarrage moteur.
-> La BCM n'est pas autorisée à envoyer la clé secrète
Immobilizer - engine not running due to BCM
Immobilizer - engine not running due to BCM in secure mode
Immobilizer - engine not running due to no BCM authorisation
Immobilizer - engine not running due to a CAN network problem with the BCM
L'ECM est "autoprotégé" et n'autorise pas le démarrage moteur.
-> L'ECM a subit une tentative "d'intrusion" ou a détécté une erreur interne (EEPROM, FLASH...)
Bit5/Bit4 : 0=ECM virgin - Secret key not learnt / 1=Not used / 2=Not virgin ECM - Secret key learnt in erasable area / 3=Not virgin ECM - Secret key learnt in non erasable area
Bit0 : 0=Immobilizer engine running forbidden / 1=Immobilizer engine running authorized
Lever position is in Park or Neutral and no default on lever) OR (default on lever and lever position not in drive neither in reverse (Neutral SW)
Lever position is in Park or Neutral and no default on lever) OR (default on lever and lever position not in drive neither in reverse (Neutral SW)
Vehicle Immobilizer function NOT active (VerlogStatus = « Unlocked »)
No engaged gear ( neutral or park)
The electric machine speed must be lower than 50 rpm
The inverter must be unlocked (VERLOG function)
Vehicle Immobilizer function NOT active (VerlogStatus = « Unlocked »)
The inverter status must be POWER OFF (5)
The inverter status must be POWER OFF (5)
1) Respecter les conditions d'entrée en Routine (cf. Services Conditions for Inverter)
3) Si la condition globale est OK, lancer la procédure d'apprentissage Zero Angle
